summary: Frontend visual brand identity testing for MedMentor rebrand. All 11 brand identity features tested. 10/11 pass fully. 1 minor text formatting issue found in chat screen (duplicate Dr. prefix). Tab order fix from iteration_2 confirmed working.

minor.issue: Login response returns empty full_name field, but greeting on home shows 'Dr. Bernardo' (likely loaded from profile API separately). Greeting still works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Empty state text shows 'O Dr. Dr. Maria Silva está pronto para ajudá-lo' - duplicate 'Dr.' prefix. The chat page adds 'Dr.' before mentor_name which already has 'Dr.' in it.

action_items: Fix duplicate 'Dr.' prefix in chat screen empty state: 'O Dr. Dr. Maria Silva' → should be 'O Dr(a). Maria Silva' or similar without duplicating the title
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.tsx correctly implements all brand colors: primary=#0D7377, secondary=#00B4D8, text=#14213D, background=#F8FAFB
BrandLogo.tsx renders circuit-board cross SVG correctly with teal fill
WhisperSpinner.tsx: useNativeDriver:true on Animated is unsupported in React Native Web (harmless warning, falls back to JS animation)
_layout.tsx: Tab order is now CORRECT: Inicio → Historico → Salvos → Perfil (was fixed in previous iteration)

test_credentials.mentor: dra.priscillafrauches@medmentor.com / MedMentor@2025 (not tested - mentor login UI tested only)

login_screen_brand_logo.notes: BrandLogo (circuit-board cross SVG) shows at top. MedMentor title in teal #0D7377. Tagline 'O conhecimento do especialista, na palma da sua mão' present.

login_submit.notes: Login with goulart.faria@gmail.com / MedMentor@2025 succeeds. Navigates to onboarding on first login. Console shows success.

home_personalized_greeting.notes: 'Boa noite, Dr. Bernardo' shown with Inter_700Bold font. Time-based greeting logic works.

home_2col_mentor_grid.notes: At 390px width, mentor cards show in 2-column grid. 4 cards: Dr. Maria Silva, Dr. João Santos, Dr. Ana Costa, Dra. Priscilla Frauches. Teal 'Consultar' buttons on each card.

header_teal_background.notes: All tab headers (Inicio, Historico, Salvos, Perfil) show teal background rgb(13, 115, 119) = #0D7377

bottom_nav_tab_order.notes: Tab order is correct: Inicio → Historico → Salvos → Perfil (fix from iteration_2 confirmed)

bottom_nav_active_teal.notes: Active tab color is rgb(13, 115, 119) = #0D7377. Inactive tabs use rgb(156, 163, 175) = textTertiary gray.

history_teal_filter_chips.notes: History screen shows 'Todas' active chip with teal background (white text). 'Hoje', 'Semana', 'Mes' are inactive. Mentor filter chips visible. Conversation cards with Continuar/Nova Consulta buttons.

chat_screen_teal_header.notes: Conversation screen header is teal #0D7377 with white 'Conversa' title, back arrow, and bookmark icon.

mentor_login_brand.notes: Mentor login accessible via 'Sou Mentor - Entrar no Portal' link. Shows BrandLogo SVG, MedMentor title in teal, 'Portal do Mentor' subtitle. Teal Entrar button. 'Área do Médico Assinante' link in teal.

profile_teal_styling.notes: Profile screen has teal header 'Perfil', teal avatar circle with initials 'BE'. Shows user name 'Bernardo Faria', CRM 214005, Especialidade Ginecologista. Camera badge for avatar upload. 26 teal elements total.

context_for_next_testing_agent: React Native Expo web app. URL: https://medmentor-rebrand.preview.emergentagent.com. All brand identity features (BrandLogo, teal colors #0D7377, personalized greeting, 2-column mentor grid, tab order) are working correctly. Test credentials: goulart.faria@gmail.com / MedMentor@2025. Minor: Chat empty state shows 'O Dr. Dr. [Name]' duplicate prefix. Login API returns empty full_name but greeting works via profile API cache.

duplicate_dr_prefix.root_cause: Chat screen empty state message template prepends 'Dr.' to the mentor's full_name field. If the mentor's stored name already includes 'Dr.' prefix (e.g., 'Dr. Maria Silva'), the result is 'O Dr. Dr. Maria Silva'.
duplicate_dr_prefix.fix: Either strip existing Dr./Dra. prefix from mentor name before applying template, or use the mentor name as-is without prepending 'Dr.'
